## Checklist

- [ ] I have **not removed any required field** from `cmt-metadata.json`, `cmt-state.json`, or `program-metadata.json`.
- [ ] All new or updated chain-derived values are supported by an on-chain citation (Explorer link or RPC query result).
- [ ] I have run `python scripts/validate_snapshot.py` locally and it passes.
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` with a description of my changes.
- [ ] I have not committed any private keys, RPC auth tokens, or wallet credentials.
- [ ] If this PR updates security metadata, it aligns with `SECURITY.md` and `security.txt`.
